summary: Turkey's public engagement with post-quantum cryptography is led by BTK, the Information and Communication Technologies Authority, which has run a programme themed Cybersecurity and Post-Quantum Cryptology promoting the spread of quantum-resistant cryptography in the country. No national post-quantum standard, algorithm choice or migration timeline has been published.
